sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102730" key="taxupterorrue/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰχῠ-πτερορρῠέω</orth>, <sense id="n102730.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">moult quickly</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1</biblScope> </bibl> (better <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ταχὺ πτ-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
